title: ISE Exporter Health
description: Collection-plan health, source-event freshness, reporting-view coverage, and top-K truncation. A successful query is separated from genuinely current source data.

panels.title: Unavailable Enabled Datasets
panels.description: Enabled authoritative datasets whose latest collection attempt failed.

panels.title: Stale Enabled Datasets
panels.description: Enabled datasets without a successful replacement inside twice their configured interval.

panels.title: Views Without Recent Rows
panels.description: Timestamped Data Connect views with no rows in the configured bounded recent window. This does not claim that the full historical view is empty; proving that would require an unsafe unbounded scan.

targets.expr: (count(ise_dataconnect_view_has_recent_rows == 0) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_freshness",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_freshness",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_freshness",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_freshness",source="dataconnect"}) == 1)))

panels.title: Truncated Breakdowns
panels.description: Collector dimensional breakdowns where the configured top-K limit omits groups. Exact total metrics remain authoritative.

targets.expr: ((count(ise_dataconnect_radius_topk_truncated == 1) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1)))) + ((ise_dataconnect_radius_active_groups_truncated and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius_active",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius_active",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius_active",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius_active",source="dataconnect"}) == 1)))) + ((count(ise_dataconnect_posture_topk_truncated == 1) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_posture",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_posture",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_posture",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_posture",source="dataconnect"}) == 1)))) + ((count(ise_dataconnect_endpoint_topk_truncated == 1) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_endpoints",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_endpoints",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_endpoints",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_endpoints",source="dataconnect"}) == 1)))) + ((count(ise_dataconnect_diagnostic_topk_truncated == 1) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_performance",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_performance",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_performance",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_performance",source="dataconnect"}) == 1)))) + ((count(ise_tacacs_topk_truncated == 1) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="tacacs_activity",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="tacacs_activity",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="tacacs_activity",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="tacacs_activity",source="dataconnect"}) == 1)))) + ((ise_tacacs_internal_user_inventory_truncated and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="tacacs_config",source="rest"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="tacacs_config",source="rest"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="tacacs_config",source="rest"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="tacacs_config",source="rest"}) == 1))))

panels.title: Unavailable Dataset Details
panels.description: Every enabled unavailable or stale dataset, its collection source, bounded failure category, and operator-safe detail. A NONE row explicitly confirms that all enabled datasets are available and fresh.

targets.expr: ((ise_dataset_last_failure_detail_info or label_replace((ise_dataset_last_failure_info unless on(dataset,source) ise_dataset_last_failure_detail_info), "detail", "Failure category: $1; inspect exporter journal", "reason", "(.+)") or (label_replace(label_replace(ise_dataset_up, "reason", "not_attempted", "dataset", ".+"), "detail", "No collection attempt has completed or failed yet", "dataset", ".+") unless on(dataset,source) (ise_dataset_last_failure_info or ise_dataset_last_failure_detail_info))) and on(dataset,source) ((ise_dataset_up == 0) and on(dataset,source) (ise_dataset_enabled == 1))) or label_replace(label_replace(((ise_dataset_fresh == 0) and on(dataset,source) (ise_dataset_up == 1)) and on(dataset,source) (ise_dataset_enabled == 1), "reason", "stale", "dataset", ".+"), "detail", "Last successful collection is older than two configured intervals", "dataset", ".+") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(absent(count(((ise_dataset_up == 0) or on(dataset,source) (ise_dataset_fresh == 0)) and on(dataset,source) (ise_dataset_enabled == 1))), "dataset", "NONE", "", ".*"), "source", "-", "", ".*"), "reason", "healthy", "", ".*"), "detail", "All enabled datasets are available and fresh", "", ".*")

panels.title: Dataset Collection Attempt and Success Age
panels.description: Seconds since each enabled dataset was last attempted and last replaced successfully. Missing success series mean that dataset has never completed successfully since exporter state was reset.

panels.title: Data Connect Source-Event Freshness
panels.description: Recent-row presence and newest recent event inside each view's configured bounded window. Each source probe returns at most one row; global emptiness, exact counts, and full-history scans are intentionally omitted to protect MnT.

panels.title: Posture Coverage
panels.description: Fraction of posture-applicable endpoints with a recent assessment in the bounded reporting window.

panels.title: Unknown Endpoint Profiles
panels.description: Current endpoints whose profile is missing or unknown.

panels.title: Endpoints Stale 90d
panels.description: Current endpoint inventory not updated during the last 90 days.

panels.title: MnT Detail Coverage
panels.description: Successful detail lookups divided by selected active endpoints.

panels.title: MnT Detail Truncated
panels.description: 1 means candidate active endpoints exceeded the configured detail-request bound.

panels.title: NAD Inventory Export Coverage
panels.description: Configured NADs selected for per-device series versus the exact ERS inventory total. Truncated=1 means inactive devices were omitted after active devices were prioritized.

targets.expr: ise_nad_inventory_selected and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_nad_health",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_nad_health",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="devices",source="rest"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="devices",source="rest"}) == 1))

ise_nad_inventory_total and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_nad_health",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_nad_health",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="devices",source="rest"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="devices",source="rest"}) == 1))

ise_nad_inventory_truncated and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_nad_health",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_nad_health",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="devices",source="rest"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="devices",source="rest"}) == 1))

panels.title: NAD Activity Group Coverage
panels.description: Data Connect NAD activity groups returned versus the exact pre-limit group count. Unconfigured-event totals cover only the returned top-K when truncated=1.

targets.expr: ise_nad_activity_groups_returned and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_nad_health",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_nad_health",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="devices",source="rest"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="devices",source="rest"}) == 1))

ise_nad_activity_groups_total and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_nad_health",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_nad_health",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="devices",source="rest"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="devices",source="rest"}) == 1))

ise_nad_activity_groups_truncated and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_nad_health",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_nad_health",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="devices",source="rest"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="devices",source="rest"}) == 1))

panels.title: Data Connect Collection Cadence
panels.description: Scheduled domain cadence and bounded event scan windows. The client applies the per-statement duty-cycle cooldown shown below; the scheduler does not apply that delay a second time.

panels.title: Data Connect Worker / Queue
panels.description: One worker executes reporting domains serially. Queue depth above zero is expected during a paced cold start but should eventually drain.

panels.title: Oldest Data Connect Queue Wait
panels.description: Time the oldest reporting domain has waited behind the serialized duty-cycle gate.

panels.title: MnT Posture Worker
panels.description: Whether the independent bounded MnT detail-refresh lane is currently executing.

panels.title: Data Connect Statements per Minute
panels.description: Fixed reporting-view labels only; arbitrary SQL is never exported.

panels.title: Latest Data Connect Query Duration
panels.description: Latest completed statement latency by reporting view. This remains visible across the intentionally sparse production cadence; use the histogram metric for long-range percentile analysis.

panels.title: Latest Data Connect Rows Returned
panels.description: Client-side result size by fixed reporting view; a failed latest attempt publishes zero instead of retaining an older successful row count. Grouped result caps protect exporter memory and metric cardinality.

panels.title: Latest Global Query Cooldown
panels.description: Quiet time imposed after each view query to keep aggregate Data Connect database duty cycle within the configured ceiling.

panels.title: MnT Unpaged ActiveList Safety
panels.description: The cheap ActiveCount result, configured ceiling, and whether the exporter refused the unpaged ActiveList download.

panels.title: Exporter Build Identity
panels.description: Exact deployed source revision and supported Cisco ISE release. A revision of unknown means the packaging layer did not inject a build identity.

panels.title: Data Connect Enforced Safety Limits
panels.description: Effective hard client limits. Production should show a duty-cycle ceiling no higher than 0.1%, a query timeout no higher than 15 seconds, 5,000 rows, and 64 MiB retained bytes.
